findings.message: Agent body has zero example/invocation blocks
No explicit output-format section defining the structure of the security findings report
Generic rubric check for missing 'name' frontmatter does not apply — this ecosystem derives the agent type name from the filename, not a frontmatter field, and this holds across all 22 scored files
Dependencies and devDependencies use caret ranges instead of exact pins; a committed package-lock.json fully mitigates this in practice
21 e2e fixture agents lack a formatted example/invocation block; each instead describes an input config to expected-tool-set mapping in prose
Generic rubric check 'model not declared' misfires on these 21 e2e fixtures, which intentionally omit model to test tool/extension scoping, not model behavior
Dependencies and devDependencies use caret ranges instead of exact pins; a committed package-lock.json fully mitigates this in practice
Agent body has zero example/invocation blocks — File body contains no '<example>' or '## Example' section and no sample Agent(...) invocation or sample output
No explicit output-format section defining the structure of the security findings report — Body ends at 'Be concise.' with no structural template for the findings report
21 e2e fixture agents lack a formatted example/invocation block; each instead describes an input config to expected-tool-set mapping in prose
Generic rubric check for missing 'name' frontmatter does not apply — this ecosystem derives the agent type name from the filename, not a frontmatter field, and this holds across all 22 scored files
Generic rubric check 'model not declared' misfires on these 21 e2e fixtures, which intentionally omit model to test tool/extension scoping, not model behavior
